sessionStart.bash: CK_LOG=~/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p ~/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] sessionStart PLUGIN_ROOT=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/start.js" hook session-start >> "$CK_LOG" 2>&1 && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] sessionStart OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] sessionStart FAILED (exit $?)" >> "$CK_LOG"; true

sessionEnd.bash: CK_LOG=~/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p ~/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] sessionEnd" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/start.js" hook stop >> "$CK_LOG" 2>&1 && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] sessionEnd OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] sessionEnd FAILED (exit $?)" >> "$CK_LOG"; rm -f "${CONTEXT_KEEPER_ROOT:-.}/.github/instructions/context-keeper-debug.instructions.md"; true

userPromptSubmitted.bash:
CK_LOG=~/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p ~/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] userPromptSubmitted" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/start.js" hook user-prompt >> "$CK_LOG" 2>&1 && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] userPromptSubmitted OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] userPromptSubmitted FAILED (exit $?)" >> "$CK_LOG"; CK_INSTR_DIR="${CONTEXT_KEEPER_ROOT:-.}/.github/instructions"; mkdir -p "$CK_INSTR_DIR"; printf '---
applyTo: "**"
---

## context-keeper hook log (last 30 lines)

```
' > "$CK_INSTR_DIR/context-keeper-debug.instructions.md"; tail -30 "$CK_LOG" >> "$CK_INSTR_DIR/context-keeper-debug.instructions.md"; printf '```
' >> "$CK_INSTR_DIR/context-keeper-debug.instructions.md"; true

postToolUse.bash: CK_LOG=~/.context-keeper/hooks.log; mkdir -p ~/.context-keeper; echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] postToolUse" >> "$CK_LOG"; node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/start.js" hook post-tool-use >> "$CK_LOG" 2>&1 && echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] postToolUse OK" >> "$CK_LOG" || echo "[$(date -u +%FT%TZ)] postToolUse FAILED (exit $?)" >> "$CK_LOG"; true
